content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.swarm.p2p
FILE: cosmos/core/swarm/p2p.py (604 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: cosmos P2P Swarm v2.6 - The "Professorial" Gossip Protocol.

"I decided to build my own internet, with blackjack and... wait, wrong catchphrase."

Improvements:
1. TCP-based Multiplexed Streams: High reliability peer communication.
2. Gossipsub Simulation: Efficient broadcast of Knowledge Fragments 

CLASSES:
- PeerInfo
- StateCheckpoint: V4.0: Periodic state snapshot for fault-tolerant recovery.
- SwarmFabric: Advanced Decentralized Networking Layer.
  Methods: async def start(self)
  Methods: async def broadcast_to_bootstrap(self, msg: dict)
  Methods: async def broadcast_skill(self, skill_data: dict)
  Methods: async def submit_task_auction(self, task_id: str, task_desc: str)
  Methods: async def broadcast_message(self, msg: dict)
  Methods: async def send_to_peer(self, peer_id: str, msg: dict)
  Methods: async def broadcast_conversation(self, conversation: list[dict])
  Methods: async def gossip(self, msg: dict)
